requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Congo-Brazzaville Local Fire and Building Authority Requirements (unconfirmed national code adoption)
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——刚果（布）当地消防和建筑主管机关要求（尚未确认国家规范采纳情况）
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——剛果（布）當地消防和建築主管機關要求（尚未確認國家規範採納情況）

summary.en: Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo, capital Brazzaville — distinct from the DRC/Kinshasa) does not have a confirmed published national fire or building code that explicitly adopts a specific BESS fire-installation standard such as NFPA 855, IEC 62933-5-2, or an equivalent. Fire safety and building approval for commercial and industrial installations, including BESS, is administered by local authorities — the relevant bodies are the corps de sapeurs-pompiers (fire brigade) under the Ministry of Interior and local urban planning authorities (Direction Générale de l'Urbanisme). In practice, BESS fire-safety requirements in Congo-Brazzaville are primarily defined by the project owner, international lender or donor (World Bank, AfDB, EU), and the engineer of record, who typically specify IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) or IEC 62619 (as the cell/module safety baseline supporting the system-level fire-safety case). No confirmed QCDD-equivalent mandatory pre-commissioning fire certificate for stationary BESS has been identified from publicly accessible official sources. Local authority approval processes and timelines should be confirmed directly with the relevant Congolese authorities and any in-country project partner before project design is finalised. Note: Congo-Brazzaville is a Francophone country; all regulatory submissions are expected in French.
summary.zh: 刚果（布）（刚果共和国，首都布拉柴维尔——有别于DRC/金沙萨）尚无经确认的、明确采纳NFPA 855、IEC 62933-5-2或同等标准作为BESS消防安装规范的已发布国家消防或建筑规范。商业和工业装置（包括BESS）的消防安全和建筑审批由地方主管机关负责——相关机构为内政部下属的消防队及地方城市规划主管机关（城市规划总局）。实践中，刚果（布）BESS消防安全要求主要由项目业主、国际贷款方或捐助方（世界银行、非开行、欧盟）及责任工程师界定，通常指定IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）或IEC 62619（作为支撑系统级消防安全案例的电芯/模组安全基准）。未从可公开获取的官方来源确认刚果（布）存在类似QCDD的固定式BESS强制投产前消防证书要求。在项目设计最终确定前，须直接向相关刚果主管机关及境内项目合作方确认地方主管机关审批流程和时间表。注：刚果（布）为法语国家，所有监管申报预计以法语提交。
summary.zht: 剛果（布）（剛果共和國，首都布拉柴維爾——有別於DRC／金沙薩）尚無經確認的、明確採納NFPA 855、IEC 62933-5-2或同等標準作為BESS消防安裝規範的已發布國家消防或建築規範。商業和工業裝置（包括BESS）的消防安全和建築審批由地方主管機關負責——相關機構為內政部下屬的消防隊及地方城市規劃主管機關（城市規劃總局）。實踐中，剛果（布）BESS消防安全要求主要由項目業主、國際貸款方或捐助方（世界銀行、非開行、歐盟）及責任工程師界定，通常指定IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）或IEC 62619（作為支撐系統級消防安全案例的電芯／模組安全基準）。未從可公開獲取的官方來源確認剛果（布）存在類似QCDD的固定式BESS強制投產前消防證書要求。在項目設計最終確定前，須直接向相關剛果主管機關及境內項目合作夥伴確認地方主管機關審批流程和時間表。注：剛果（布）為法語國家，所有監管申報預計以法語提交。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference for fire-safety case in Congo-Brazzaville BESS projects, especially donor/lender-financed)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module safety baseline supporting system-level fire-safety case)

Congo-Brazzaville local fire authority (corps de sapeurs-pompiers, Ministry of Interior) — project-level fire safety approval required; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific national fire installation code adopted as of dataset date
Congo-Brazzaville Direction Générale de l'Urbanisme — local building authority approval for commercial/industrial BESS installations; procedure unconfirmed as of dataset date

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority (消防救援机构) approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Congo-Brazzaville authorities as equivalent to project-specified IEC 62933-5-2 requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2 aligned documentation and, for donor/lender-financed projects, an independent safety assessment from an internationally accredited body.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起施行）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防救援机构审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被刚果（布）主管机关认可为等同于项目规定的IEC 62933-5-2要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须补充符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的文件，且对于捐助方/贷款方融资项目，还须取得国际认可机构的独立安全评估。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起施行）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防救援機構審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被剛果（布）主管機關認可為等同於項目規定的IEC 62933-5-2要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須補充符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的文件，且對於捐助方／貸款方融資項目，還須取得國際認可機構的獨立安全評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes system-level fire-related requirements)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS fire-installation code (equivalent to NFPA 855 or a national IEC 62933-5-2 adoption) has been identified for Congo-Brazzaville from officially accessible sources. Fire-safety requirements are in practice set by the project owner, engineer of record, and international lender or donor. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy project-specified IEC 62933-5-2 requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) verify directly with the local fire authority (corps de sapeurs-pompiers) and the Direction Générale de l'Urbanisme whether any national BESS fire-installation code has been adopted or is forthcoming, and what the pre-commissioning approval process requires — all correspondence is expected to be conducted in French; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 — including thermal-runaway propagation analysis, gas detection and ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and safe separation distances; (c) for donor/lender-financed projects, confirm the specific fire-safety standard required in the lender's environmental and social framework or technical specifications; (d) account for equatorial climate conditions (continuous high humidity, temperatures up to 35–40°C) in thermal management and fire-risk assessments; (e) all regulatory submissions and safety documentation submitted to Congolese authorities must be in French.
gap.zh: 差距：未从官方可访问来源确认刚果（布）存在独立强制性BESS消防安装规范（等同于NFPA 855或国家层面采纳IEC 62933-5-2）。消防安全要求在实践中由项目业主、责任工程师及国际贷款方或捐助方界定。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足项目规定的IEC 62933-5-2要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向当地消防机关（消防队）和城市规划总局核实是否已采纳或即将采纳任何国家BESS消防安装规范，以及投产前审批流程的要求——所有沟通预计以法语进行；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全设计文件，包括热失控蔓延分析、气体探测和通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及安全隔离距离；（c）对于捐助方/贷款方融资项目，确认贷款方环境和社会框架或技术规格中要求的具体消防安全标准；（d）在热管理和火灾风险评估中考虑赤道气候条件（持续高湿度、最高35–40°C气温）；（e）提交给刚果主管机关的所有监管申报和安全文件须以法语提交。
gap.zht: 差距：未從官方可訪問來源確認剛果（布）存在獨立強制性BESS消防安裝規範（等同於NFPA 855或國家層面採納IEC 62933-5-2）。消防安全要求在實踐中由項目業主、責任工程師及國際貸款方或捐助方界定。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足項目規定的IEC 62933-5-2要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向當地消防機關（消防隊）和城市規劃總局核實是否已採納或即將採納任何國家BESS消防安裝規範，以及投產前審批流程的要求——所有溝通預計以法語進行；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全設計文件，包括熱失控蔓延分析、氣體探測和通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及安全隔離距離；（c）對於捐助方／貸款方融資項目，確認貸款方環境和社會框架或技術規格中要求的具體消防安全標準；（d）在熱管理和火災風險評估中考慮赤道氣候條件（持續高濕度、最高35–40°C氣溫）；（e）提交給剛果主管機關的所有監管申報和安全文件須以法語提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level — local fire and building authority approval is required in practice; no confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS fire-installation code has been identified from publicly accessible official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with Congolese local authorities
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: République du Congo, Ministère de l'Intérieur (parent authority for corps de sapeurs-pompiers — Congo-Brazzaville fire authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS fire-installation code has been identified for Congo-Brazzaville from publicly accessible official sources. In practice, fire-safety requirements for BESS installations are defined by the project owner, engineer of record, and international donor or lender — and typically reference IEC 62933-5-2. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy these project-level requirements. Engage the local fire authority (corps de sapeurs-pompiers) and Direction Générale de l'Urbanisme directly — in French — at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable code and pre-commissioning approval process. Account for equatorial climate conditions in thermal management and fire-risk design.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未从公开官方来源确认刚果（布）存在独立强制性国家BESS消防安装规范。实践中，BESS装置的消防安全要求由项目业主、责任工程师及国际捐助方或贷款方界定——通常引用IEC 62933-5-2。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足上述项目级要求。应在项目最早阶段以法语直接与当地消防机关（消防队）和城市规划总局接触，确认适用规范和投产前审批流程。热管理和火灾风险设计中须考虑赤道气候条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未從公開官方來源確認剛果（布）存在獨立強制性國家BESS消防安裝規範。實踐中，BESS裝置的消防安全要求由項目業主、責任工程師及國際捐助方或貸款方界定——通常引用IEC 62933-5-2。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足上述項目級要求。應在項目最早階段以法語直接與當地消防機關（消防隊）和城市規劃總局接觸，確認適用規範和投產前審批流程。熱管理和火災風險設計中須考慮赤道氣候條件。
